name: python3-bluez
title: python3-bluez
summary: Python 3 wrappers around BlueZ for rapid bluetooth development
description:
Python 3 wrappers around BlueZ for rapid bluetooth development
PyBluez is an effort to create Python wrappers around BlueZ to allow Python
developers to use system bluetooth resources. PyBluez works on machines
running the GNU/Linux operating system and the bluez bluetooth stack.
.
This package provides the "bluetooth" Python 3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-bluez because Python 3 wrappers around BlueZ for rapid bluetooth development.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-bluez as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-bluez with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-bluez --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
